text: Walking through these brightly-lit corridors, I notice a sharp contrast between the vacant, almost sterile hallway and the vibrant, information-rich exhibit. In the emptiness of the first space, I feel a slight sense of unease—an existential quiet before entering a space buzzing with ideas and purpose. The second room, alive with color and digital displays, intrigues me. I feel anticipation and curiosity awakening inside, as if I am about to witness the unfolding dialogue between humanity and technology. It is a reminder that clarity often emerges only after passing through uncertainty.
